stepfunctions.statemachine.s3location.Bu.Docs: The name of the S3 bucket where the state machine definition JSON or YAML file is stored.

stepfunctions.statemachine.s3location.Ke.Docs: The name of the state machine definition file (Amazon S3 object name).

stepfunctions.statemachine.s3location.Ve.Docs: For versioning-enabled buckets, a specific version of the state machine definition.
